sentences.arabic: صِدْقُ النِّيَّةِ وَالإِخْلَاصُ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ مَا يُمَيِّزُ الْعَمَلَ الصَّالِحَ الْمَقْبُولَ عِنْدَ اللهِ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الَّذِي يَذْهَبُ بِلَا أَجْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost namjere i ihljas spada u najveće što razlikuje dobro djelo prihvaćeno kod Allaha od djela koje odlazi bez nagrade.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity of intention and ikhlas is among the greatest things that distinguishes the righteous deed accepted by Allah from the deed that goes unrewarded.

sentences.arabic: رَوَى الإِمَامُ الْبُخَارِيُّ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ: «إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Imam Buhari prenosi da je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao: «Zaista se djela ocjenjuju prema namjerama.» [Biljezi ga Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: Imam al-Bukhari narrated that the Prophet (peace be upon him) said: «Indeed, deeds are judged by their intentions.» [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: اسْتَنْبَطَ الإِمَامُ الشَّافِعِيُّ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ يَدْخُلُ فِي ثُلُثِ الإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Šafija, Allah mu se smilovao, zaključio je da ovaj hadis ulazi u trećinu islama.
sentences.translationEn: Imam al-Shafi'i, may Allah have mercy on him, deduced that this hadith comprises one third of Islam.

sentences.arabic: وَيُبَيِّنُ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ أَنَّ الإِخْلَاصَ يَعْنِي قَصْدَ وَجْهِ اللهِ وَحْدَهُ لَا الثَّنَاءَ أَوِ الرِّيَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Ibn Tejmijje, Allah mu se smilovao, objašnjava da ihljas znači usmjerenost jedino prema Allahovom licu, a ne prema hvali ili pokazivanju.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn Taymiyyah, may Allah have mercy on him, explains that ikhlas means intending only Allah's face alone, not praise or showing off.

sentences.arabic: يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُجَدِّدَ نِيَّتَهُ قَبْلَ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ، مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ إِلَى طَلَبِ الرِّزْقِ إِلَى خِدْمَةِ الْأَهْلِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba obnavljati namjeru prije svakog djela — od namaza do traženja opskrbe do služenja porodici.
sentences.translationEn: The Muslim should renew their intention before every deed, from prayer to seeking provision to serving family.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْعَمَلَ الصَّغِيرَ بِنِيَّةٍ صَادِقَةٍ يَتَجَاوَزُ فِي مِيزَانِ اللهِ الْعَمَلَ الْكَثِيرَ الَّذِي يُرَادُ بِهِ الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Malo djelo s iskrenom namjerom u Allahovoj vagi prevazilazi mnogo djelo kojim se želi dunjaluk.
sentences.translationEn: A small deed with a sincere intention outweighs in Allah's scales a large deed done for worldly gain.
